gates.technical_scope_pass: Named verifier/SENTRY/acceptance receipt for this scope
gates.commit_sha_present: Commit SHA present without deploy+runtime probe
gates.deploy_sha_present: Deploy SHA present; runtime probe missing/failed/not run
gates.cleared_for_founder_alpha: Technical + staging evidence PLUS credentialed pre-alpha Layer B PASS (LIFEOS_FOUNDER_LOGIN_* on live Railway; receipt products/receipts/FOUNDER_JWT_CHAT_PROOF.json or equivalent). Soft/command-key E2E alone is insufficient.
gates.founder_usability_confirm: Explicit founder confirmation artifact (not soft probe)
gates.point_b_target_reached: FOUNDER_USABILITY_PASS === true plus technical gates for that Point B target
gates.release_transport_proof: Transport proof: commit/origin/deploy SHA match + runtime probe OK
gates.fully_machine_ready_closure: Same-tier determinism + closure acceptance + live deploy/runtime truth + founder UI proof (all true)

ladder.means: No governed work yet (markdown ladder rank 0)
Stopped on typed blocker (markdown ladder rank 2)
Machine checks for this scope passed (markdown ladder rank 3)
Code exists / committed; not proven on served runtime (markdown ladder rank 4)
Deployed somewhere; runtime behavior not yet verified (markdown ladder rank 5)
Mechanical SENTRY suite green (markdown ladder rank 6)
Staging bar met per cert schema (markdown ladder rank 7)
Machine believes Adam can test; no usability grant yet (markdown ladder rank 8)
Adam confirmed usable for the scoped ask (markdown ladder rank 9)
Scoped Point B target reached (markdown ladder rank 10)
Deploy-truth + runtime behavior verified for the claim (markdown ladder rank 11)
Highest factory maturity claim (markdown ladder rank 12)

cert_level_notes.BOOTSTRAP_AND_STAGING_READY: Compound cert flag (staging + bootstrap); not a second ladder rung. Alias maps readers to STAGING_READY for overclaim checks only.
cert_level_notes.BLUEPRINT_DUPLICABLE: Cert boolean only — not a ladder claim word.
cert_level_notes.GREENFIELD_DETERMINISTIC_MECHANICAL: Cert boolean only — not a ladder claim word.
cert_level_notes.MECHANICAL_DETERMINISM_PROXY: Cert boolean only — not a ladder claim word.
cert_level_notes.FULL_LOOP_GOVERNED: Cert boolean only — not a ladder claim word.
cert_level_notes.SAME_TIER_CODER_DETERMINISM: Required subordinate proof for FULLY_MACHINE_READY; not a ladder rung.
cert_level_notes.LUMIN_FACTORY_GITHUB: Optional org step; not a ladder claim word.
cert_level_notes.LIFEOS_PRODUCT_COMPLETE: Product-complete cert flag; not a ladder claim word.
cert_level_notes.PACK_COMPLETE: Mission-pack structural finish — not RELEASE_PASS or founder-done.
